name: eccos
description: Self-hostable, open-source WhatsApp gateway on the official Meta Cloud API. Runs as a Bun binary or entirely on Cloudflare Workers.
author: Santiago García Monsalve

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core && cd apps/gateway && wrangler types && tsc --noEmit && cd ../.. && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: bun test packages/core/tests/parser.test.ts packages/core/tests/signature.test.ts apps/gateway/tests/connect-api.test.ts apps/gateway/tests/worker-config.test.ts
scripts.test:all: bun run test && bun run test:workers
